title: SlayTheSpire2RunFileV9
description: First-pass contract for StS2 run export JSON (informally 'v9'). Based on observed Early Access dumps; expect to tighten when canonical game fields are known. Unknown top-level keys are allowed.
$comment: Do not set additionalProperties false until real exports are mapped; game may add fields anytime during EA.

schema_version.description: Optional contract marker for this JSON document.

run_id.description: Stable identifier for this run within the export format.

status.description: Normalized outcome for fixtures and tests; game exports may use different strings until normalized.

decks.description: Optional snapshot of deck state when present in export.
